message:
test: add policy rule matching and trace-reason regression tests

Add 344 lines of unit tests for the policy engine's core matching and
trace-reason logic, covering the fix tracked in ft-13l5b.

config_rule_trace_reason tests (5 tests):
- Validate that the trace reason message uses rule.message (not the
  former self.message) when a rule is selected with/without a message
- Verify correct phrasing when a rule matches but loses tie-breaking,
  both with and without winner ID and rule message

matches_rule tests (11 tests):
- Catch-all (empty PolicyRuleMatch matches everything)
- Action match and mismatch
- Actor match and mismatch
- Surface case-insensitive matching
- Pane ID match, mismatch, and None-input cases
- Domain match and None-input cases
- Combined multi-field matching (action + actor + surface + pane)
- Capability-based filtering (requires_prompt)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
